overview.description: Cloud-based hospitality operating system for hotels powered by AI
overview.description_long: Mews is the operating system for modern hotels, unifying property management (PMS), point-of-sale (POS), embedded payments, and AI-powered revenue management (RMS) in a single cloud platform. Founded in Prague in 2012, Mews powers 15,000+ properties in 85+ countries and has reached unicorn status. The platform includes AI features such as Smart Tips (personalisation) and agentic AI for guest experience automation.
overview.tagline: The operating system for modern hotels

history.origin_story: Richard Valtr founded Mews in Prague in 2012 with the goal of modernising hotel operations. The Emblem hotel in Prague became their first customer in 2013, and they remain a customer today.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by Richard Valtr
The Emblem Hotel (Prague) becomes first customer
First funding round; begins European expansion
Raises $33M Series B; opens US office; makes first acquisition
Raises $185M Series C led by Kinnevik and Goldman Sachs; further acquisitions
Raises $110M Series D led by Kinnevik at $1.2B valuation; achieves unicorn status; named Best PMS by HotelTechReport
Raises $75M round led by Tiger Global; reaches 12,500 customers
Raises $300M Series D; named Best PMS, Best POS, Best Places to Work in Hotel Tech by HotelTechReport for 2026

awards: Best Hotel Restaurant POS Systems – HotelTechAwards 2026
Best Places to Work in Hotel Tech – HotelTechAwards 2024
Best Places to Work in Hotel Tech – HotelTechAwards 2025
Best Places to Work in Hotel Tech – HotelTechAwards 2026
Great Place to Work Certified (Czech Republic)
Great Place to Work Certified (United Kingdom)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Mews is a full-stack hospitality operating system with deep workflow integrations (PMS, POS, payments, RMS), not a thin AI wrapper. However, AI-powered revenue management and guest personalisation features could be commoditised by foundation models. Customer lock-in through 1,000+ marketplace integrations and enterprise contracts provides a meaningful moat.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The hotel PMS market is large, proven, and growing. Mews has 15,000+ paying properties across 85 countries, holds ~20% European market share, and competes from a strong position against legacy incumbents like Oracle Opera. Unicorn valuation and back-to-back top HotelTechAward wins confirm product-market fit.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Mews has raised over $700M in equity across multiple rounds (including a $300M Series D in early 2026) with top-tier investors (Kinnevik, Goldman Sachs, Tiger Global). 1,300+ employees and 15,000+ customers signal a sustainable revenue base.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Well-funded, market-leading SaaS scaleup with strong customer lock-in, a deep ecosystem of integrations, and a proven enterprise go-to-market. AI displacement risk is mitigated by the breadth of workflow automation beyond pure AI features.

metadata.notes: Founded in Prague (confirmed by company website 'Mews was born in Prague'), though some tech press describes it as Amsterdam-founded; both cities appear to be key offices. The $300M round in 2026 is labelled 'Series D' in official press releases, though TechCrunch labelled the 2024 $110M round also as Series D — possible tranche/extension or re-labelling. The $75M round in March 2025 was separate equity from Tiger Global. An additional $100M debt raise occurred in September 2024 per TechCrunch.
